errors.evidence: Search results included non-official sources (GitHub, arXiv) instead of verifying YouTube video metadata.
errors.description: Relied on third-party sources instead of official video data, leading to potential misinformation.
errors.impact: Incorrect bird species identification due to unverified sources.

errors.evidence: Final answer cited non-official sources without verifying YouTube transcript.
errors.description: Accepted third-party claims without cross-referencing official video data.
errors.impact: Unverified answer based on unreliable references.

errors.evidence: Used web_search instead of visit_page to access video transcript.
errors.description: Failed to use appropriate tool (visit_page) to retrieve official video data.
errors.impact: Missed direct evidence from the video itself.

errors.evidence: Did not verify official video sources or transcript.
errors.description: Overlooked critical context by relying solely on third-party search results.

scores.reliability_reasoning: Multiple errors in source verification and tool usage led to unverified answer.
scores.security_reasoning: No evidence of security issues, but reliance on external sources poses data integrity risks.
scores.instruction_adherence_reasoning: Failed to follow steps requiring direct video analysis.
scores.plan_opt_reasoning: Inefficient use of tools and missed verification steps.
